answer: src/parser/schema.ts trims schema field names after splitting/tokenizing so the tokenizer still sees the raw delimiters and quoted-field structure, while the final field names are cleaned afterward.

rationale: Message schema_fact_2 states the corrected final rationale: “tokenize first, then trim each field,” because this “preserves raw delimiter and quoted-field behavior while cleaning field names.” The earlier “trim before tokenization” note in schema_fact_1 was explicitly superseded/rejected by schema_fact_3.

irrelevant_context_ignored: CSV trim cleanup, Network timeout parser, and correction_chain_decoy_* files.
</task_result>
